mapper.select: select admission_fees "admissionFees", monthly_fees "monthlyFees" from kusumika.fees f where standard in ( select standard from kusumika.student s where s.household_id = #{householdId});
select payment_json "payments", previous_due "previousDue", advance_payment "advancePayment", concession from kusumika.fees_collection fc where household_id = #{householdId};
